name: CodeRabbit for Open Source
description: CodeRabbit provides free AI-driven code reviews for public repositories on GitHub and GitLab, backed by a $1 million commitment to open-source sponsorships.

perks.title: Free AI Code Reviews
perks.description: Full access to CodeRabbit's AI code review platform for all open-source projects at no cost.

perks.title: Sponsorship Funding
perks.description: Financial sponsorship as part of CodeRabbit's $1M open-source commitment for qualifying projects.

perks.title: PR Spam Filtering
perks.description: AI-powered tools to filter out low-quality and AI-generated PR spam, reducing maintainer workload.

eligibility: Must be an open-source project with a publicly available repository.
Repository must be hosted on GitHub or GitLab.
Must demonstrate active development and community engagement.
applicationProcess: Fill out the CodeRabbit OSS Program application form.
CodeRabbit reviews the application and reserves the right to approve or deny sponsorship.
